features.name: unpacked array memory with asymmetric ports
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array memory with mismatched address and data widths causing bram mapping failure
features.snippet:
reg [7:0] ram[1023:0];
always @(posedge clk) if (ce) q <= ram[addr];

features.name: single-port read-only memory with 10-bit address
features.description: Code should include a read-only memory array with address width incompatible with Xilinx RAMB36 bram geometry
